commands_run: bun -e '<read-only route/corridor grouping candidate scan over canonical JSONL plus merges/do-not-merge/prior prep guards>'
jq -r 'select(.record_id|IN(...selected route/corridor ids...)) | {record_id,display_name,payload,source_ids,evidence_refs}' data/canonical/routes.jsonl data/canonical/corridors.jsonl | jq '.'
bun -e '<read-only exact selected pair guard check against data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json>'
jq -c --arg id '<block_id>' 'select(.block_id==$id)' raw/sources/<source_id>/blocks.jsonl for selected source evidence blocks
